candidates.title: iPhone Silver Jewelry Photoshoot & Editing
candidates.brief: I need a creative shooter-editor based in Nagpur who can capture my silver jewellery line with nothing more than a recent-generation iPhone and then polish every frame through AI-powered post-production. The look I’m after is minimalist and clean—crisp, shadow-controlled images on a pure or near-white backdrop that will slot straight into my online store without additional retouching. Here’s the flow: we meet at my workspace (or a mutually convenient studio in the city), set up simple tabletop lighting, and photograph each piece from multiple angles. After the shoot, you’ll run the files through tools such as Lightroom Mobile, Photoshop’s Generative Fill, Luminar AI, or a similar platform to remove imperfections, balance tones, isolate the jewellery on white, and export consistent, web-ready crops. Deliverables • 20 finished JPEGs (3000 × 3000 px, sRGB, <2 MB each) • Matching PNGs with t

candidates.title: 3D Sculpted Bas-Relief STL for Acoustic Guitar Rosette Mold
candidates.tools: Premiere Pro · Photoshop · InDesign — for scalable vector artwork and layered/retouched assets
candidates.brief: I am looking for a 3D digital sculptor / bas-relief artist, not just a mechanical CAD modeler, to create a CNC-ready STL for a custom acoustic guitar rosette mold. This is a circular ring-shaped relief that will be used to machine a mold for pressing layered micarta/paper composite material. The final visual effect should feel like a flowing Damascus/terrain pattern, with the word CARLSON subtly hidden within the sculpted surface. The goal is not simple raised text, embossed lettering, engraved lettering, or letters with a bevel/fillet. The entire ring needs to be a continuous sculpted flowing surface. The letters should form the high points/peaks of the terrain, while the negative spaces and areas between letters should flow smoothly down into valleys. There should be no flat stamped-looking areas between letters, inside letters, or between repeated words. Fixed dimensions: * Outer diam

candidates.title: Nagpur Silver Jewelry Photoshoot
candidates.tools: Photoshop · Lightroom — for layered/retouched assets and multi-page layout
candidates.brief: I have about 2,000 pieces of 925 sterling-silver jewellery that now need clean, consistent imagery for our online catalogue and marketplaces. All shots must be taken here in Nagpur, preferably in a simple studio set-up so the metalwork stays the hero and lighting is fully controlled. For most pieces a plain white sweep is enough, but a few designs could benefit from a quick prop to help them stand upright—simple jewellery stands or holders will do. If a piece already balances well on its own, no prop is required; I’ll decide on the day which ones need the extra support. After shooting, each file has to be delivered on pure #FFFFFF with no visible shadows or colour cast. I’m comfortable if you run the clean-up through an AI workflow, Photoshop, or Lightroom—as long as the final images are crisp, evenly exposed and ready for immediate upload. candidates.title: Photo Retouching & Compositing
candidates.tools: Photoshop — for scalable vector artwork and layered/retouched assets
candidates.brief: I have a collection of high-resolution TIFF images -- some digital, others scanned from 35 mm transparencie -- that need a retouch. The job mainly covers these areas: background removal and adding a plain-white or white acrylic mirrored backdrop (3 files); clean scanned transparencies by taking out visible dust and scratches (3 files), correction of color shifts (all); enhancing logo and metal fastenings on bag photo (1 file); retouching watch photo and compositing pushed-in crown (1 finished file; was photographed with crown out to stop watch movement), retouching wine bottle (1 file; smoothing highlights/removing reflections;) retouching a few flowers in a vase. You’ll receive TIFF files, a reference photo for the watch image, and more detailed instructions. I’ll start by providing a link to download ZIP file containing TIFF files and detailed editing instructions. Deliverables • TIFF

candidates.title: Experienced VFX Artist/Team Needed
candidates.tools: After Effects — for layered/retouched assets and video/motion editing
candidates.brief: 1. Project Overview Objective: We are seeking a skilled VFX artist or team to provide post-production visual effects and compositing for a short-form video. 2. Scope of Work Cleanup & Prep: Rotoscoping, wire/rig removal, and general plate cleanup. Tracking: 2D motion tracking and 3D camera tracking/matchmoving. Compositing: Seamlessly integrating CGI elements, stock assets, or 2D motion graphics into live-action plates. VFX Generation: Creating required digital effects (e.g., atmospheric effects, screen replacements, particle systems, or basic 3D assets). Integration: Ensuring all VFX elements perfectly match the lighting, grain, and color profile of the original footage. 3. Deliverables Fully composited, high-resolution final video files (e.g., ProRes 422 HQ, MP4). Alpha channel renders of isolated VFX elements (if required). replacement_note: GEN-FREE replacement for a removed generative-expand task. NO image_generative_expand, NO generative fill/outpaint, NO upscale. O8 stock-hero = license a correctly-sized stock image + crop/reframe + place logo (NOT expand a small image).
